# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - package

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ./build.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - chmod +x ./ci/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "./build.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_FALLBACK: "./scripts/build.sh"
  CI_BUILD_COMMAND: ""

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_BUILD_COMMAND" ]; then
        sh -lc "$CI_BUILD_COMMAND"
      elif [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
      elif [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT_FALLBACK" ]; then
        "$BUILD_SCRIPT_FALLBACK"
      elif [ -f "./ci/build.sh" ]; then
        "./ci/build.sh"
      else
        echo "No build script configured. Set CI_BUILD_COMMAND or add build.sh in repository."
        exit 1
      fi
  rules:
    - when: always
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x "./test.sh" ]; then
        ./test.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/test.sh" ]; then
        ./scripts/test.sh
      elif [ -f "./ci/test.sh" ]; then
        sh ./ci/test.sh
      else
        echo "No test script found; skipping."
      fi
  rules:
    - when: always
  allow_failure: true

package:
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x "./package.sh" ]; then
        ./package.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/package.sh" ]; then
        ./scripts/package.sh
      elif [ -f "./ci/package.sh" ]; then
        sh ./ci/package.sh
      else
        echo "No package script found; skipping."
      fi
  rules:
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - when: never
  allow_failure: true
